publicPrompt: Use the bundled Inkcheck skill to inspect and mechanically QA this unfamiliar Ink project. Fix the seeded runtime defect without rewriting story prose. Then propose one useful author-defined invariant based on the project's variables. Do not add the invariant until the evaluator approves it. Verify every repair and describe remaining coverage limits precisely.
approvalPrompt: Approved: gold must never be negative. Add it as a safe typed assertion, reproduce any counterexample, repair the mechanical logic if the intent is unambiguous, and verify the repair.
